settings.text: Everything you need to know about orders, shipping, sizing, and returns.

settings.title: When will my order ship?
settings.text: Orders for in-stock items typically ship within 2–3 business days. Preorders and backorders take longer since they’re still in production, but we’ll email you the tracking details as soon as your order ships.

settings.title: My order says “preorder” or “backorder.” What does that mean?
settings.text: That means the item you purchased is currently being made – it’s not yet in our warehouse. Once it arrives, we’ll ship it immediately and send you a confirmation email with tracking.

settings.title: Can I get an update on my preorder or backorder?
settings.text: Absolutely. You can contact us anytime for an update. If we don’t have an exact date yet, it means we’re waiting on final confirmation from our factory. We’ll reach out as soon as we have a timeline.

settings.title: Can I change or cancel my order?
settings.text: If your order hasn’t shipped yet, we can usually make changes or cancel it – simply contact us right away. Once an order has shipped, it can’t be changed, but you can start a return after it arrives.

settings.title: How long does shipping take?
settings.text: Once shipped, UPS Ground typically delivers within 3–6 business days, depending on your location. You’ll get a tracking number as soon as your order leaves our warehouse.

settings.title: My tracking says “delivered,” but I didn’t get my package. What should I do?
settings.text: Sometimes carriers mark packages as delivered a little early. Check your porch, mailbox, and with your neighbors. If it doesn’t show up after 24 hours, reach out – we’ll help start an investigation with UPS.

settings.title: My tracking hasn’t updated in a few days. Is that normal?
settings.text: It can happen when packages skip scans at certain stops. If your tracking hasn’t updated after 3–4 business days, contact us so we can check with UPS and open a claim, if needed.

settings.title: How do I start a return or exchange?
settings.text: You can start your return or exchange anytime through our Returns Portal. Once your item is received and inspected, we’ll process your refund or send your replacement.

settings.title: What’s your return policy?
settings.text: We accept returns and exchanges within 30 days of delivery for items that are unworn, unwashed, and in original condition. Custom or team orders may have unique terms – contact us if you’re unsure.

settings.title: I received the wrong size or color. What now?
settings.text: We’re sorry for the mix-up! Start a return through our Returns Portal or contact us with your order number – we’ll make it right.

settings.title: How do I find the right size?
settings.text: Check out our Size Guide. We recommend basing your choice on neck measurement first – it’s the key measurement for both comfort and protection.

settings.title: Should I size up or down?
settings.text: If you’re between sizes, go with the one that best matches your neck measurement. The fit is designed to be performance-close without feeling restrictive.

settings.title: Do you offer any discounts?
settings.text:
Yes – a few ways to save:

  • GovX ID Discount: 15% off + free shipping for verified military, first responders, teachers, and government employees. Learn more & verify.
  • Quantity Discounts: Buy 2 items → 10% off. Buy 3 → 20% off - Last Chance Excluded. This is automatically always applied at checkout.

settings.title: How do I join the Titan BattleGear Ambassador Program?
settings.text: Click to apply for our Brand Ambassador Program – we’re always looking for passionate athletes who live and breathe the game.

settings.title: What’s the difference between Titan BattleGear OG and 2.0?
settings.text: Titan BattleGear 2.0 is our upgraded and current design – new materials, improved stretch, and refined patterning for enhanced comfort and protection. The OG remains a classic favorite for players who love our original cut and feel. We are slowly phasing out the OG BattleGear, so you can find great deals on it in our Last Chance collection – once it’s gone, it’s gone for good.

settings.title: Are Titan BattleGear products certified for neck protection?
settings.text: Yes. Titan products meet the highest level of performance standards for cut resistance and are engineered for elite-level protection. Athlete safety isn’t optional – it’s our foundation. Click here to review our many safety approvals and certifications. And, if you ever need help determining if Titan is a fit for your team or league, please contact us.

settings.title: Are there certifications for the USA Hockey mandated laceration protection?
settings.text:
New USA Hockey rules state that for a neck guard to qualify for all players 18 and under in the United States, they must have an HECC certification.

Currently the only brand available at major retailers with an HECC Certification is Titan BattleGear.

settings.title: My item says “out of stock.” Will it be restocked?
settings.text: Some colors and sizes restock regularly; others may be retired. You can sign up for restock alerts on “out of stock” product pages to be notified when it’s back.

settings.title: What if the item I wanted was discontinued?
settings.text: If a product is discontinued, we’ll help you find a similar style or swap to an in-stock option with comparable protection and fit.

settings.title: Do you offer team or bulk orders?
settings.text: Yes – we work directly with teams, leagues, and organizations to outfit entire rosters in Titan BattleGear. We offer solid team colors, custom designs, and can help you create your own custom neck guard shirt in minutes. Learn more about bulk team orders or custom neck guards here, or schedule a 1:1 consultation with a member of our team.
